prompt: Create a realistic close-up emotional portrait of a young East Asian woman with long black hair, natural makeup, realistic skin texture, and a few loose strands falling across her face. Use a vertical 9:16 composition, extremely tight crop: only the right half of her face is sharp and visible, with one expressive brown eye centered slightly right of frame, part of her nose and a gentle smiling mouth near the lower right edge. Her hand is held very close to the camera in the foreground, palm facing outward and fingers spread, forming a large soft blurred frame that covers most of the left side and lower edge of the image; the hand must be heavily out of focus from shallow depth of field. Keep the camera angle intimate and slightly above eye level, as if the viewer is very close to her. The mood is warm happiness and a subtle smile, conveyed only through her eye, relaxed cheek, and delicate mouth expression, not exaggerated. Lighting is soft, natural, and cinematic, with warm beige shadows, gentle highlights in the eye, realistic pores, fine lashes, and no plastic smoothing. Hair should be dark, slightly tousled, with individual strands crossing her forehead and cheek. Background is abstract and blurred, neutral brown-gray. Add small elegant editorial text on the upper left: large widely spaced serif word SMILE, with a tiny thin subtitle beneath reading Happiness looks gorgeous on you. Minimal magazine-cover aesthetic, muted colors, realistic photography, shallow depth of field, 85mm portrait lens look, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted fingers, no uncanny eyes.
promptEn: Create a realistic close-up emotional portrait of a young East Asian woman with long black hair, natural makeup, realistic skin texture, and a few loose strands falling across her face. Use a vertical 9:16 composition, extremely tight crop: only the right half of her face is sharp and visible, with one expressive brown eye centered slightly right of frame, part of her nose and a gentle smiling mouth near the lower right edge. Her hand is held very close to the camera in the foreground, palm facing outward and fingers spread, forming a large soft blurred frame that covers most of the left side and lower edge of the image; the hand must be heavily out of focus from shallow depth of field. Keep the camera angle intimate and slightly above eye level, as if the viewer is very close to her. The mood is warm happiness and a subtle smile, conveyed only through her eye, relaxed cheek, and delicate mouth expression, not exaggerated. Lighting is soft, natural, and cinematic, with warm beige shadows, gentle highlights in the eye, realistic pores, fine lashes, and no plastic smoothing. Hair should be dark, slightly tousled, with individual strands crossing her forehead and cheek. Background is abstract and blurred, neutral brown-gray. Add small elegant editorial text on the upper left: large widely spaced serif word SMILE, with a tiny thin subtitle beneath reading Happiness looks gorgeous on you. Minimal magazine-cover aesthetic, muted colors, realistic photography, shallow depth of field, 85mm portrait lens look, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted fingers, no uncanny eyes.
promptZh: 创作一张逼真的情感特写肖像，主角为 一位留着黑色长发、妆容自然、皮肤纹理真实、几缕发丝散落在脸颊上的年轻东亚女性。采用 9:16 竖构图，极度紧凑的剪裁：仅右半边脸清晰可见，一只富有表现力的棕色眼睛位于画面中心偏右位置，部分鼻子和柔和的微笑嘴唇位于右下边缘附近。她的手置于前景，非常靠近镜头，手心向外，手指张开，形成一个大而柔和的模糊框架，覆盖了图像左侧和底部的绝大部分；由于浅景深效果，手部必须处于高度失焦状态。保持亲密的拍摄角度，略高于视线水平，仿佛观众正近距离注视着她。氛围为 温暖的幸福感和淡淡的微笑，仅通过眼睛、放松的脸颊和细腻的嘴部表情传达，切勿夸张。光线柔和、自然且具有电影感，带有温暖的米色阴影，眼睛中有柔和的高光，皮肤毛孔真实，睫毛纤细，无塑料感磨皮。头发应为深色，略显凌乱，有几缕发丝穿过额头和脸颊。背景为抽象且模糊的中性棕灰色。在左上方添加优雅的小型编辑风格文字：大号且字间距较宽的衬线字体单词 SMILE，下方配以极小的细体副标题 Happiness looks gorgeous on you。极简杂志封面美学，色彩柔和，写实摄影，浅景深，85mm 人像镜头质感，无水印，无多余人物，无扭曲手指，无诡异眼神。
